alias: Walmart Garage - OPEN when driver is on the way
description: Open garage when Walmart notification indicates driver is ACTUALLY en route (not order confirmation). Checks title and text for real delivery notifications. Enables override and locks kitchen door if unlocked.

data.title: Door Locked
data.message: Kitchen door was unlocked and is now locked for security

data.title: Walmart Delivery Alert
data.message: Driver is actually en route — garage opened.
